RLEState(3) Library Functions Manual RLEState(3)

NAME

RLEState - Run-length encoding state for ANSI color optimization.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/common.h>

Data Fields


int cFR
int cFG
int cFB
int cBR
int cBG
int cBB
int runLen
int seeded

Detailed Description

Run-length encoding state for ANSI color optimization.

Used by NEON renderer for efficient color output.

Definition at line 219 of file video/ascii/common.h.

Author

Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>

Version 0.9.4 ascii-chat
